section.heading: Relationship to the Social Security Act

content.p: Except as otherwise provided in this chapter, the benefits payable under the System are in addition to the benefits payable under the Social Security Act.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 99–335, title I, § 101(a), June 6, 1986, 100 Stat. 522.)

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: The Social Security Act, referred to in text, is act Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, 49 Stat. 620, which is classified generally to chapter 7 (§ 301 et seq.) of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see section 1305 of Title 42 and Tables.
